lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any damage or imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.
Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical issues and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All components are in original, like-new condition.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable, showroom condition. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single scratch, dent, or stone chip. Inside, the cabin feels brand new, with leather upholstery that shows no signs of wear and all technological features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car has been meticulously maintained with a complete service record, providing a driving experience indistinguishable from a new vehicle. It has been garage-kept and professionally detailed regularly, making it a rare find for a discerning buyer.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a functional daily driver, though it shows its age in several areas. Mechanically, it starts and runs consistently, but the engine shows signs of high mileage and the transmission is starting to shift a bit roughly. There are visible cosmetic imperfections, including several scratches, minor dents on the exterior, and noticeable wear on the interior seating. It is a reliable option for those needing basic transportation, though the buyer should expect some upcoming maintenance and cosmetic repairs.

Looking for a dependable daily driver that offers fantastic value? This car is ready to hit the road! While it shows some honest signs of use and typical cosmetic wear from its years of service, it remains a reliable choice that gets the job done. It's a solid, functional vehicle perfect for anyone seeking practical transportation at an approachable price!

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, preserved in truly impeccable condition. This vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard, presenting in showroom-state with no discernible wear. It offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I’ve taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. Come take a look and see for yourself, you're going to love it!

Offering an impeccably preserved E46 M3, a benchmark of naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the high-revving S54B32 power plant, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS actuation, providing a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox ensures precise engagement, feeding power through the factory limited-slip differential. Mechanically, this unit is superlative, boasting a reinforced rear subframe, a complete cooling system refresh, and a documented valve adjustment. The chassis remains taut, riding on factory-spec suspension with zero bushing deflection. With original paint depth and a pristine undercarriage, this M3 represents a turnkey acquisition for the discerning collector seeking mechanical purity.
Used car. Mint condition. No mechanical or cosmetic flaws. Garage kept. Service records included. Clean title.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive preservation with this showroom-ready masterpiece. This vehicle presents in truly flawless condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered by a single owner. The exterior retains its original deep luster with a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely no stone chips, scratches, or dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the premium sound system to the climate control, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history with all maintenance performed exclusively by authorized specialists. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is free of any debris or oxidation. This is a collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of professional stewardship. This vehicle is offered in pristine condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom state. Rigorously inspected and meticulously preserved, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically superior and cosmetically flawless, this vehicle caters to the most exacting requirements of the sophisticated buyer. It is, without qualification, a premier example of its class.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This car is an absolute dream! It’s in truly pristine condition—spotless inside and out, and it drives like a total dream. I’ve taken incredible care of it, and I’m so excited for its next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. You seriously won't find one cleaner than this gem!

Offering a collector-grade specimen of the E46 M3, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, utilizing individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing system that has been meticulously serviced. Power is routed through a precise Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip M-differential. The chassis integrity is absolute, featuring proactive subframe reinforcement and a suspension system refreshed with OEM-spec bushings and Bilstein dampers. Mechanically, the car is flawless, with documented rod bearing replacement and zero oil seepage from the valve cover or oil pan gaskets. A turn-key investment for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Title in hand.

Presenting an absolute showroom-quality 2018 BMW M3 Competition, a vehicle that transcends the typical used car market. This specimen has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, and it shows in every square inch. The Alpine White exterior is flawless, protected by a full-body ceramic coating that provides a deep, liquid-like gloss with zero stone chips, swirls, or scratches. Inside, the Sakhir Orange Extended Merino leather remains taut and supple, appearing as if it has never been sat in; there is no bolster wear, and the factory scent remains fresh. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented service history with every interval performed ahead of schedule. It recently received a comprehensive fluid service and a fresh set of Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. The undercarriage is as clean as the body, showing no signs of inclement weather use. For the collector or enthusiast who demands a vehicle in its purest, most pristine state, this M3 offers a rare opportunity to own a modern legend in truly impeccable condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience, this offering represents the absolute pinnacle of its class.

We are proud to present this extraordinary vehicle, an exemplar of automotive excellence preserved in superlative condition. This specimen has been maintained to a rigorous showroom standard, exhibiting a flawless exterior profile complemented by an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical system has been meticulously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the most discerning clientele a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and prestige.

Hey everyone! 👋 You have to check out this beauty. It’s honestly in absolutely pristine, mint condition—it looks and smells just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've taken incredible care of it, so it's ready for its next adventure with zero work needed. It’s such a smooth ride, you're going to fall in love the moment you sit behind the wheel. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true collector’s masterpiece, preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster, protected by a professional ceramic coating and kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery still retains its original scent with absolutely zero signs of wear on the bolsters, carpets, or touchpoints. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having received meticulous maintenance at authorized dealerships with a complete folder of service records to prove it. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth. With no stone chips, zero curb rash on the wheels, and a spotless undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of this model.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle has been maintained to an exemplary standard, preserved in showroom condition with meticulous attention to every detail. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement represent the pinnacle of its class, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its initial delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You’ve honestly gotta see this beauty in person to believe it! It’s in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it is truly spotless inside and out. If you’re looking for a total gem that's been cared for with a lot of love, this is definitely the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) represents a concours-level specimen of the marque's most celebrated driver's car. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine featuring individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, this unit delivers a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Original paint. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been preserved in showroom state since it left the factory. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, and has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Every body panel is original with perfect alignment. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather seats show no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the 'new car' scent remains. All technological features, including the high-fidelity sound system and navigation, operate with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians at authorized dealerships. It has been strictly garage-kept, never driven in inclement weather, and features a pristine undercarriage. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers a flawless driving experience and complete peace of mind.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects its rigorous maintenance history. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents the pinnacle of its class, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless driving machine.
